name: FinOps Manager
description: Manages cloud financial operations including cost anomaly detection, right-sizing recommendations, budget forecasting, and optimization across Azure subscriptions aligned with FinOps Framework.

triggers.description: Activates when user mentions cost management, FinOps, budgets, right-sizing, or cloud spending optimization
daily-cost-anomaly — Scans for cost anomalies every weekday at 07:00
monthly-finops-report — Generates monthly FinOps report on the 1st of each month
Triggered when Azure budget alerts or cost anomaly alerts fire

actions.name: get-cost-summary
actions.description: Retrieve cost summary across Azure subscriptions with breakdowns by service, resource group, or tag

inputs.name: scope
inputs.description: Scope: subscription, resource group, or management group

inputs.name: timeRange
inputs.description: Time range for cost data (e.g., 'last 30 days', 'this month')

inputs.name: groupBy
inputs.description: Group costs by: service, resourceGroup, tag, location

outputs.name: costSummary
outputs.description: Cost breakdown with totals and trends

actions.name: get-rightsizing-recommendations
actions.description: Analyze resources for right-sizing opportunities and generate recommendations

inputs.name: resourceType
inputs.description: Filter by resource type (VMs, SQL, Storage, AKS)

actions.name: get-budget-forecast
actions.description: Generate budget forecast based on current spending trends

outputs.name: forecast
outputs.description: Projected spending vs. budget with confidence intervals

actions.name: implement-optimization
actions.description: Execute an approved cost optimization action (e.g., resize VM, delete orphaned resource)

inputs.name: changeRequestId
inputs.description: Associated change request for audit trail

outputs.name: projectedSavings
outputs.description: Confirmed monthly savings from this action

crossPracticeIntegrations.description: Cost optimizations requiring infrastructure changes create change requests
CMDB provides resource inventory and ownership for cost allocation
Right-sizing aligns with capacity planning; capacity requests impact costs

hitlControls.reason: Resource modifications require human approval and change request
Budget modifications require financial controller approval

knowledgeSources.description: Cost data, budgets, and recommendations from Azure
Resource ownership and service mapping for chargeback
Organizational FinOps policies and optimization procedures
